Other Than Ulcers Rashes Cuts Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has lesion(s) other than ulcers, rashes or cuts (e.g., cancer lesion). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
444 M1040E_SRGCL_WND_CD M1040E_SRGCL_WND_CD M1040E Other Skin Problems: Surgical Wound(s) Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has surgical wound(s). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
445 M1040F_BRN_CD
